texto: You deserve this. Even when you feel like you don’t. You do. You deserve to have a healthy, loving, grace-filled relationship with yourself. You deserve to stop hurting in secret and in shame. You deserve to fully experience life. You deserve to be heard and helped. You deserve everything the negative voices have told you you don’t.
autor: 21 Things I’ve Learned In 21 Months of Recovery From Self Harm (via thefemmeinist)
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a 21 Things I’ve Learned In 21 Months of Recovery From Self Harm (via thefemmeinist): compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “You deserve this. Even when you feel like you don’t. You do. You deserve to have a healthy, lovin…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, recovery, self-love pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de self-love.
